segments.text: That's why that last recovery was getting shut down clean, there was no way around it - genuinely a smart decision right there!
segments.original_text: ですからね今のトロッコ トラックで復帰はそのまま潰していこうと回避なかったので今のマジでいい選択でした

segments.text: But on Acola's side, he threw out up B right there, and the reaction was lightning quick!
segments.original_text: ただアコーラ側がね上Bを打ちましたねそこに対して 反応早かったですね

segments.text: From down tilt into the air - no more resources! There's genuinely nothing left to work with!
segments.original_text: 下強から空中へもう資材がありませんよこれ ガチリソースない

full_text: That's why that last recovery was getting shut down clean, there was no way around it - genuinely a smart decision right there! But on Acola's side, he threw out up B right there, and the reaction was lightning quick! From down tilt into the air - no more resources! There's genuinely nothing left to work with!
